questions.question: Solve the recurrence relation: $a_n = 3a_{n-1} - 2a_{n-2}$, where $a_1 = 1$ and $a_2 = 2$.
questions.hint: Use the characteristic equation method and initial conditions.

questions.question: What is the general solution for the recurrence relation $a_n = 2a_{n-1} + a_{n-2}$?
questions.hint: Use the characteristic equation method and consider the case where the roots are complex.

questions.question: Given the recurrence relation $a_n = -n a_{n-1} + (n+1)a_{n-2}$, find the value of $a_5$ if $a_1 = 0$ and $a_2 = 1$.
questions.hint: Use the given recurrence relation and initial conditions to find a pattern in the sequence.
